name: PaperQueue
subtitle: A focused reading queue for your Zotero library.
description: AltStore source for PaperQueue — a native reading-queue companion for your Zotero library.

apps.name: PaperQueue
apps.subtitle: Read more of your Zotero library, with less friction.
apps.localizedDescription:
PaperQueue turns your Zotero library into a focused, curated reading queue. Build a queue, mark papers as read, reorder by priority, search and add by DOI, and browse collections — all synced through Zotero tags so it works across your devices. On iPhone/iPad it's a companion for managing your queue; read the PDFs on your Mac in Zotero.

This build is unsigned — install it with AltStore/SideStore, which re-signs it with your own Apple ID.

versions.localizedDescription: First public build: curated reading queue via Zotero tags, library search & filters, collection browsing, add-by-DOI, history and stats.
